jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Radiologist at CMC Vellore
jsonLd.description:
CMC Vellore, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Radiologist for our Srinagar operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About CMC Vellore:
CMC Vellore is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CMC Vellore!
